title: Access Immigration Online :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Access Immigration Online
If you submitted an application using the old Immigration Online system, you can still access the application you submitted.

## Changes to our online application systems
Immigration New Zealand aims to provide a trusted and effective service to all our customers and kaimahi. We recently started Our Future Services — a long-term work programme moving us towards that goal. During this programme, we are moving all visa applications and processing onto our enhanced Immigration Online system.
More information about which applications have moved, and which are moving soon, is available on the Our Future Services programme page.
Our Future Services programme
More information about the enhanced Immigration Online system:
Enhanced Immigration Online

## Access to old applications
You can access your applications submitted through the Immigration Online system here:
Access your old applications
If you have any problems accessing your old applications, contact us.
